title: GeOre Nouveau
description: Adds Ars Nouveau golems for GeOre geodes
body:
Have you ever thought to yourself "I wish there were more of those Ars Nouveau Amethyst Golems". Have you ever been in a conversation with others and said "Ya know, I really hope GeOre will add support for Ars Nouveau Golems". Well, this mod is for you!

These new GeOre golems function the same as Ars Nouveau's counterpart, you summon them via performing the ritual of awaking near a budding GeOre block.

The type of golem will depend on the type of GeOre, you want a cool dark blue one you should use it near a Lapis Budding block ;)



For questions feel free to join my Discord.

[![Discord Link](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/611982123435556884/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/maPeNBK "Discord Link")
